title: Zosima pimpinelloides
intro: Zosima pimpinelloides, also known as Russian tarragon, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae, characterized by its pungent, anise-like flavor and aroma. The health benefits of Russian tarragon include its antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in digestion, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The bioactive constituents of this plant include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal and culinary uses. Russian tarragon is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also employed as a flavoring agent in traditional medicine and cooking, particularly in Eastern European and Asian cuisine.
